title: Crisp Melon Soup
description: A refreshing summer soup made with crisp melon, perfect for a light lunch or dinner.
instructions: 1. In a large pot, combine diced melon and peppery water.
2. Bring the mixture to a boil, then reduce heat and simmer for 10 minutes.
3. Stir in russian yogurt and soup broth.
4. Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
6. Chill the soup in the refrigerator for at least 30 minutes.
7. Serve the soup cold, garnished with additional diced melon if desired.
